We can test the options by checking if they satisfy all three statements.  

Option B (U, W, X true; T false) makes the first premise true (false ⊃ false is true), the second premise true (false ⊃ anything is true), and the third premise true (false ⊃ true is true), so it works.  

Thus, the set is consistent with that valuation.
